<div class="kg-card kg-product-card">
  <div class="kg-product-card-container">
    <img class="kg-product-card-image" src="https://cdn.test/product.jpg" alt="">
    <div class="kg-product-card-title">Sample widget</div>
    <div class="kg-product-card-description">A short product description.</div>
    <a class="kg-product-card-button kg-product-card-btn-accent" href="https://example.com/buy">Buy now</a>
  </div>
</div>
